name: DJZS Protocol
description: Logic Firewall for AI Agents — audits the reasoning behind an agent's move before on-chain execution, producing verifiable PASS/WAIT/FAIL verdicts with reproducible verdict hashes

mcp.install: claude mcp add --transport http djzs-trust https://mcp.djzs.ai/mcp

tools.name: verify_pm_trade
tools.description: Deterministic pre-execution audit of a prediction-market trade thesis — returns PASS to PROCEED, FAIL, or WAIT to HALT with flagged defects and a reproducible verdict_hash. Prediction-market only; audit before act.

tools.name: query_pol_certificates
tools.description: Query immutable ProofOfLogic certificates stored on Irys Datachain by DJZS Protocol.

tools.name: query_agent_trust
tools.description: Query an agent's live on-chain DJZS trust score (Base mainnet, indexed by the DJZS subgraph on The Graph): totalAudits, pass/fail counts, failRate, latest verdict and risk, and an action of PROCEED, HALT, or NO_HISTORY.

infrastructure.inference: Anthropic API — N=3 consensus extraction only; the verdict is computed by a frozen deterministic engine, never by a model
infrastructure.settlement: Base Mainnet — x402/USDC payment to treasury; on-chain trust scores via DJZSLogicTrustScore
